2025-06-26 04:42:02,767 - enterprise_admin_service - INFO - Получен запрос: GET https://bot.vochi.by/enterprise/0201/sip-lines
2025-06-26 04:42:02,938 - enterprise_admin_service - INFO - Executing query in get_sip_lines for enterprise 0201:

        SELECT
            su.id,
            su.line_name,
            su.prefix,
            su.provider_id,
            p.name as provider_name,
            inc_schema.name as incoming_schema_name,
            ARRAY(
                SELECT s.name
                FROM outgoing_schemas s
                JOIN sip_outgoing_schema_assignments sosa ON s.id = sosa.schema_id
                WHERE sosa.sip_line_id = su.id
            ) as outgoing_schema_names
        FROM
            sip su
        JOIN
            sip_providers p ON su.provider_id = p.id
        LEFT JOIN
            incoming_schemas inc_schema ON su.in_schema = inc_schema.id
        WHERE
            su.enterprise_number = $1
        ORDER BY
            su.id;

2025-06-26 05:11:56,149 - enterprise_admin_service - INFO - GSM_LINES: Выполняем SQL-запрос:

        SELECT
            g.gateway_name,
            g.id as gateway_id,
            gl.id,
            gl.line_id,
            gl.internal_id,
            gl.prefix,
            gl.phone_number,
            gl.line_name,
            ds_in.name as incoming_schema_name,
            gl.shop,
            gl.slot,
            gl.redirect,
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT array_agg(ds_out.name ORDER BY ds_out.name)
                 FROM gsm_outgoing_schema_assignments gosa
                 JOIN dial_schemas ds_out ON ds_out.id = gosa.schema_id
                 WHERE gosa.gsm_unit_id = gl.id),
                '{}'::text[]
            ) as outgoing_schema_names
        FROM goip g
        LEFT JOIN gsm_lines gl ON g.id = gl.goip_id
        LEFT JOIN dial_schemas ds_in ON ds_in.id = gl.in_schema
        WHERE g.enterprise_number = $1
        ORDER BY g.gateway_name, gl.id
